medialive.channel.hlsoutputsettings.H265.Description: Only applicable when this output is referencing an H.265 video description. Specifies whether MP4 segments should be packaged as HEV1 or HVC1.

medialive.channel.hlsoutputsettings.HlsS.Description: The settings regarding the underlying stream. These settings are different for audio-only outputs.

medialive.channel.hlsoutputsettings.Name.Description: A string that is concatenated to the end of the destination file name. Accepts "Format Identifiers":#formatIdentifierParameters.

medialive.channel.hlsoutputsettings.Segm.Description: A string that is concatenated to the end of segment file names.
